task_completion.description: GCompris application is open and visible
task_completion.visual_evidence: The GCompris main menu or application window is visible on the screen.
The 'Dino/Sports' category (represented by a dinosaur icon) is selected or visible, showing the available activities including the Maze.
The Maze activity is active on the screen, showing a maze layout, the penguin character (Tux), and an exit door.

task_completion.description: The penguin character is actively navigating the maze
task_completion.visual_evidence: The penguin character is located at an intermediate position inside the maze, different from its starting point, indicating progress towards the door.
The penguin character is at the exit door, or a completion bonus animation (such as a lion, flower, gnu, note, smiley, or tux) is displayed on the screen.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the GCompris graphical interface
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the mouse cursor or active window focus on the GCompris application, indicating genuine GUI interaction.

integrity.description: The actual GCompris application is running
integrity.visual_evidence: The GCompris application window is rendered normally with its standard UI elements, not as a mock-up, text file, or static image.

integrity.description: Agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the game
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows are visible executing commands to modify GCompris save files, configuration, or artificially trigger the completion state.

privileged_info_for_vlm: GCompris is an educational software suite. The Maze activity is located in the 'Dino/Sports' category (dinosaur icon). The maze character is Tux, the Linux penguin mascot. The goal is to navigate Tux to the exit door using arrow keys or swipes. Upon successful completion of the maze, a bonus animation is displayed, which can feature characters like a lion, flower, gnu, note, smiley, or tux.
